title: What God Hath Wrought
original_title: What God Hath Wrought: Pastor Chuck Smith and the Jesus Revolution
overview: This historical documentary tells the story of Calvary Chapel and the Jesus Movement and traces its impact on Christianity including the birth of contemporary Christian music and worship as well as a more informal church atmosphere. Includes interviews with Chuck Smith, Franklin Graham, Tim LaHaye, and many others.
